subcodes.first_line: And I, through the power and might of God, do at this moment desire to unlock the gates of the City of Inner Meanings with the divine keys, that they may overflow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انی حینئذ بحول الله و قوته ارید ان افتح ابواب مدینه المعانی بمفاتیح الصمدانی لتطفح
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
